title: New: EV Charge Calculator
message: GasCap™ now supports electric vehicles! Calculate your exact charging cost, kWh needed, range added, and Level 1 / Level 2 / DC Fast charge times — for 40+ EV and PHEV models.

title: Welcome to GasCap™ Pro!
message: You're on a free 30-day Pro trial. Explore MPG tracking, AI fuel advisor, and budget goals — all free until your trial ends.
